_comment: Medium specialist with Long backup (Medium=A, Long=B, Mile=E, Sprint=F per Android DB). Stamina-leaning priority but not as aggressive as a pure stayer -- Medium is her primary distance so Speed still matters second. Long aptitude at B means she can race long but isn't optimized for it.

4._comment: Trackblazer. Long=B so the long-distance stamina floor stays close to default; targetOptionalRaceCount at 38 between Oguri's 40 (Mile-heavy schedule has more options) and the default 36.
